title: 4 things God builds before He trusts you with more
caption:
God doesn't fast-track formation.

He's not holding the next thing back because He doesn't trust you. He's building in you the kind of man that next thing requires.

Most men want the output — the influence, the relationship, the calling — before the inputs are in place. So they rush, force, and perform their way into things they aren't ready to carry. Then they wonder why it falls apart.

Here's what He's actually building:

→ Character in the dark — who you are at 11 PM with no one watching is who you actually are.
→ The patience to wait — can you hold something in tension without forcing it?
→ Faithfulness in small things — Luke 16:10. "Whoever is faithful in a very little is also faithful in much."
→ Roots before reach — depth before influence. Your private life with God is the ceiling on everything you want to build publicly.

Not a checklist to complete. These are what He forms in a man who stays in it.

The season you're in right now? He's using it.

—

Comment "form" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.

#ethos #christianmen #faithoverfear #godlymen #manofgod #disciplineequalsfreedom #masculinity #formation #christianity #scripture
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
